name: io.github.jcorderop02/packet-tracer-mcp
description: Servidor MCP para Cisco Packet Tracer 9 — permite que un LLM como Claude o ChatGPT cree, edite y valide topologías de red en vivo (Cisco IOS, OSPF, EIGRP, BGP, NAT, ACLs, VoIP, QoS, IPv6, wireless) a través del árbol IPC nativo del Script Engine de PT.

environmentVariables.name: BRIDGE_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port for the internal HTTP bridge that talks to the Packet Tracer 9 webview (default: 54321)
